label: New: Smart watering (weather-aware automations)
items: Every watering automation can now choose how it reacts to rain — Off, Skip if rain, or Smart.
Smart waits for forecast rain instead of watering, then rechecks your soil sensor and waters only if the rain didn't actually deliver — so plants never get skipped on a forecast that fizzles.
A critically-dry safety net waters straight away regardless of the forecast, so plants are never left parched while waiting for rain.
You decide what happens in a heatwave: water anyway, or keep waiting for rain.
Multiple forecast showers in a day are handled as a single sensible wait — no conflicting triggers.
Automations show a 'Waiting for rain' badge while they're holding, and the AI Area Coach now suggests the best rain setting for your plants.
